parts.title: Part 1

parts.title: Part 2
parts.context: A tour guide is giving visitors information about a local history museum.

questions.question: Questions 11 and 12. Which TWO reasons are given for the recent museum renovation?
options: A. To attract more international tourists
B. To comply with new safety regulations
C. To expand the permanent collection
D. To fix structural damage to the roof
E. To upgrade the heating system
correctAnswer: B. To comply with new safety regulations
E. To upgrade the heating system

questions.question: Question 13. The Victorian Gallery
questions.label: Match the location:

questions.question: Question 14. The Sculpture Garden
questions.label: Match the location:

questions.question: Question 15. The Interactive Children's Zone
questions.label: Match the location:

questions.question: Question 16. How much is the general admission fee for adults?
Question 17. What is the maximum group size for guided tours?
Question 18. Where can visitors leave their umbrellas and large bags?
options: A. At the main ticket desk
B. In the cloakroom near the café
C. In the secure lockers outside
questions.correctAnswer: B. In the cloakroom near the café

questions.question: Question 19. On which day is the museum closed to the public?
Question 20. What is the name of the museum's newest temporary exhibit?

parts.title: Part 3
parts.context: Two university students, James and Priya, discuss their research project on urban green spaces with their tutor, Dr. Hoffman.

questions.question: Questions 21 and 22. Which TWO problems did James identify with their survey data?
options: A. The sample size is too small
B. The questions were misunderstood by respondents
C. The data was collected in only one season
D. There was a gender imbalance in the respondents
E. The digital recording equipment failed
correctAnswer: A. The sample size is too small
C. The data was collected in only one season

questions.question: Question 23. Writing the Introduction
questions.label: Who will be responsible for this task?

questions.question: Question 24. Formatting the Bibliography
questions.label: Who will be responsible for this task?

questions.question: Question 25. Checking the statistical analysis
questions.label: Who will be responsible for this task?

questions.question: Question 26. What does Dr. Hoffman suggest they focus on in their conclusion?
options: A. Policy recommendations for local government
B. Further areas for academic research
C. Comparison with international case studies
questions.correctAnswer: A. Policy recommendations for local government

questions.question: Question 27. Why does Priya think their methodology is valid despite its limitations?
options: A. It follows a recognised academic framework
B. It was approved by the ethics committee
C. It matches the approach used in similar studies
questions.correctAnswer: C. It matches the approach used in similar studies

questions.question: Question 28. What do the students agree to add to their final report?
options: A. A map of surveyed locations
B. A glossary of technical terms
C. An appendix with raw data
questions.correctAnswer: C. An appendix with raw data

questions.question: Question 29. What is Dr. Hoffman's main criticism of the literature review?
options: A. It relies too heavily on older sources
B. It does not include enough local research
C. It is too long relative to the rest of the report
questions.correctAnswer: A. It relies too heavily on older sources

questions.question: Question 30. How does Dr. Hoffman describe the students' overall progress?
options: B. On track but needs refinement
C. Behind and requiring urgent attention
questions.correctAnswer: B. On track but needs refinement

parts.title: Part 4
